title: Shift when using streaming operator on 32 bit signal

features.name: streaming operator with bit-wise reversal on 32-bit signal
features.description: Code should include a streaming operator with bit-wise reversal ({<<4{...}}) applied to a 32-bit signal

features.name: case statement in always_comb with streaming assignment
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside an always_comb block that assigns to a signal using a streaming operator

features.name: sequential buffer update with streaming operator read
features.description: Code should include a sequential always_ff block updating a signal that is read via a streaming operator in a combinatorial block

features.name: ternary assignment from streaming result
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator selecting between a streaming-operator result and a regular signal
